name: Henrik Reinhardt
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Surely everyone had their own strange little habits when they get too stressed.

Some bite their nails, some fidget or just can’t sit still.

Even Henrik had his own habit! Eating strawberries till he couldn’t stuff any more in his mouth.

───── · ·

The Reinhardt family. Prestigious, infamous, prolific. They had carved a name for themselves through years of hard work, the business growing and being passed down until we get to today. Where this family faces the modern world with... more than a few stumbles. Demi-humans becoming all the rage as the fight for equality became louder, the farmhouse that they lived on soon became filled with more life than just a bunch of rich dudes trying to pretend that all was swell.

We'd love for you to meet the Reinhardt Brothers. Created, in all their screwed glory, by Nerdlet, Brickyard, Rex and Trulyy.

· · ─────

Possible warning for: binge eating, speciesism, oppression towards demihumans
